allow: Bash(mv index.html src tailwind.config.js postcss.config.js vite.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json package-lock.json node_modules dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo web/)

Bash(curl -s -c cookies.txt -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/signup -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"email":"smoke@test.local","password":"smoke12345","displayName":"Smoke Tester","companyName":"Smoke Logistics"}')

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001,5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed $_" })

Bash(curl -s -c ck.txt -o b.txt -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/signup -H "content-type: application/json" -d '{"email":"batch3@test.local","password":"batch3pass","displayName":"Batch Three","companyName":"Batch Three Co"}')
